title: carduus defloratus subsp. medioformis
intro: Carduus defloratus subsp. medioformis, also known as Mid-form milk thistle, is a subspecies of the milk thistle plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include silymarin, a compound that has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Carduus defloratus subsp. medioformis include liver protection, improved digestion, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, making it a popular remedy for liver diseases and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption and administration.
